message: Hey team!:rocket: Can you believe it's been 8 fantastic years for Online Boutique?
Before we dive into anniversary celebrations, let's give a warm welcome to Maya, our new Security Analyst. She's got 5 years of cybersecurity expertise under her belt! :clap:
Hi everyone! :raised_hand_with_fingers_splayed: Thrilled to be here, especially on such a special occasion. Let's make Online Boutique even successful and secure together!
Welcome, Maya! Your experience will elevate our cybersecurity efforts.
Excited to have you, Maya! Bez has been very excited to have you on the team.
Impressive! Eager to learn from you, Maya.
:+1: Welcome Maya, pleasure meeting you.
Hi Maya! Your experience is top-notch. Cheers to you and to Online Boutique's 8-year anniversary! :partying_face: :tada:
Thanks for the warm welcome! Excited for the celebration and our anniversary party.

Welcome to The Switch, the responsibility is on you to size up the problem.

 *Access game links by pressing the Uptime Labs Logo in the top right of the screen*
 *Use `/incident` to create an incident record*

Once you're ready just click start to begin
We are all so glad you have joined us Maya
Hold on, team. Quick check-in. Is anyone else experiencing internet problems or slow connectivity?
Internet's definitely sluggish, was loading up github and it took ages to load
Perhaps it could be due to the increase of sales we have been having with this anniversary sale?
Hey team, we've seen some weird traffic from our data centre network in the last couple of days, it's been mostly minor but never as bad compared to now although
Hamed and I will have been monitoring outbound traffic. Checking for anomalies again.
Hi Team, let me check
I will try to place an order and check the platform.
Just ran a test on my internet speed.
*Incident Number INC100072:* SEV-2 huge traffic
whats happend to the platform?
HI team, we are having a huge traffice, created a SEV-2 incident
:star: Formally assign criticality level to the incident
how many customers are impacted
what should we do?
Hi @tanya, @hamed , @daniel we have a incident, could you pelase analyse and come back in 2mins
:star: Track actions and time box them
i will take a look into the logs now
could anyone let us know the recent deployment?
i will look at our services and see if there is something going on
:star: Check changes done to the platform
i will get them for you now
https://uptime-labs.atlassian.net/wiki/external/NGRkNTNhZDVjZDUyNDU5NDk2Yjg3NzcxMTE1YjkxOTA
@bob have you observe any effect from business side ?
:star: Asking questions to validate impact of the problem
sure i will take a look now
Seems that some users are having connection issues, gathering metrics on them now

Looks to be 50% of users have slow load times but are able to make purchases with no issues.
There is another 7% of users who cannot access the site at all, the reports for all isues are global
@hamed , @shay , @tanya what do you think at which service, website is failing
There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on
is this change related?
none of our services are down at the moment
Looks to be 50% of users have slow load times but are able to make purchases with no issues. There is another 7% of users who cannot access the site at all, the reports for all isues are global
:star: Qualify the problem
i took a look and i can confirm all the services are running fine right now
@shay could you please check the recent deployment change and discuss this with @daniel
:star: Reviewed changes
sure we will hop in a call together and look through all of them now
on it
@maya  could you please check any thing from the security side
hey, whats going on?
i havent been keeping up, can you catch me up on the issue
@maya we have lot of huge traffice, could you please check any issue form network side
:star: Form an effective investigation team
ok thanks for that, i will run a network security scan first and see what comes up

@daniel have mentioned this ---There is a spike in outbound connections in the edge router and the origin IP block 10.50.0.0/24. That IP range is the same as the IP block the frontend and payments are hosted on

@Maya, could you pelase check it
@daniel , @shay any updated from the recent deployment?
:star: Manage actions and timings
this is a big problem, how are soo many impacted
what are we looking into
@hamed what your suggestion on it
half way through and so far no change looks to be the issue
i can assist maya, the activity does seem suspicious
@bez we are looking into the issue
Just ran a network security scan and our issues all seem to be related to our network switch trying to figure out what exactly.

Our investigation uncovered a critical issue: the network switch was compromised due to unpatched vulnerabilities. We have identified a BotNet in the switch and it's creating outbound connections to the outside. It creates a DDOS (Distributed Denial of Service) to attack an external party
@maya @hamed , @daniel , @shay , @tanya could you please analyse from the logs whats going on here
network switch had unpatched vulnerabilities, leaving it susceptible to known exploits. Attackers had exploited these vulnerabilities, leading to the compromise of the switch's integrity
we could try restarting the switch
@hamed , so how to resolve it? any ETA for resolution?
maya is lead in security team, its best to ask her these questions
@maya will restart affect other issue?
let me check that
if not then please restart it @Maya
Your right restarting the switch isnt the best option as it might intruduce some more issues
Trying to think of another solution but i'm not too familiar with the network infrastructure here at OB
No worries Maya I can send over the graph of the network infra if you wanna look at it
That would be perfect @hamed
Looking at the diagram now, will need a moment to figure out what to do next
Let me know if you have any suggestions in the mean time
this is sevior issue , increasing the seviority of incident to SEV-1
good idea
@maya could you please find the solution and come back in 2mins
whats going on now
i need updates
i can see we have a backup switch
i need to make sure its safe to swap over to
@maya , @hamed , can we switch back to backup now, then please do it immediately
:star: Restoration over root cause analysis
:star: Take command
once we know it is safe and wont have the same issue then we can
ok the backup switch is the best option, it is asafe to do so
i will work on that now
We have an attack on our network, we are trying to use backup system
have increased the seviority to SEV-1
an attack??? what kind of one? is this a ransom?!
we need to get everyone on this, what do i tell the board?
the infected switch has been successfully changed over
@maya please go ahead and @daniel @shay @tanya @hamed please help maya in doing so
The Catalyst 9300 Series which is our infected switch has been swapped over to old but reliable (Cisco Catalyst 2960 Series)
Good job, can we confirm @aashish.kumar-ig.com?
@Bob, could you confirm the current situation
:star: Cross check resolution with stakeholders
checking with customers now
@maya is the issue resolved?
no more customer reports and users are saying there is now slowness now
:star: Cross checking resolution with team
yes i ran another scan and we are good
@shay , @tanya , @hamed , @daniel could you pelase check the network ping and logs if everythibg is correct?
speeds are back to normal now, this looks good to me
no issues on my end
same here
We have resolved the issue, network is good now
:star: Confirm resolution with the business
Cheers, everyone! Resolving these network issues added a bit of spice to our celebration
Good job team! We managed to keep the anniversary vibe alive despite the detour.
High-fives all around!  I will take out that faulty switch as soon as possible.
The website's performance is looking solid again
The anniversary orders are flowing smoothly now. No hiccups on the code side.
Our customers are back to enjoying the celebration. Happy customers, happy anniversary!
@maya  could you pelase draft the issue
Really great job @aashish.kumar-ig.com.
Special congratulations to our Incident Manager for steering the ship with finesse and to Maya for your help identifying the faulty switch. Cheers to a remarkable team! :tada:
The inicident is resolved
